title: africa-ethno-fusion: a reproducible pipeline fusing open datasets on African ethnic groups
description: Integrates the major open datasets that map which ethnic groups live where in Africa (Murdock map, GREG, GeoEPR, D-PLACE Ethnographic Atlas, Glottolog, Glottography, Joshua Project) into one GeoPandas star schema and a resolved one-row-per-group canonical layer enriched with cultural traits, language family, territory and population, plus an auditable crosswalk and an interactive web map. This deposit archives the pipeline and ID-level crosswalk; the merged corpus is rebuilt from source (some inputs are non-commercial — see PROVENANCE.md).
